Dialog.title: title
Dialog.p: The ONLYOFFICE Templates module allows you to create, manage, and use fillable PDF templates for any installed Odoo module (e.g., Sales, Invoicing, CRM). These templates can then be filled in automatically with real-time data from your Odoo system — no manual input needed.

On this page, you can create form templates for any Odoo module, such as Invoice, Receipt, Employee Leave Form, etc. Just click Create or Upload, select the desired Odoo module, and create or upload a PDF template with fillable fields.
Dialog.span: To fill in a template with Odoo data:

ol.li: Go to the relevant Odoo module (e.g., Sales, Invoices).
Choose the required template to fill in with Odoo data.

Dialog.p: This will generate a PDF document with your template, automatically filled with the corresponding record's data.
